steps.title: Connect intercepts to height
steps.content: An $x$-intercept is where $y=0$. Since $y=h(x)$ is the projectile's height, this means the projectile's height is $0$ feet.

steps.title: Use the positive time value
steps.content: The positive $x$-intercept is the positive time when the height reaches $0$ feet after launch. In context, that is when the projectile hits the ground. The answer is D.
